Book Now
Photo Booth

The Fam Jam Booth

Not just silly photos.

This is how your family actually gets a real photo together. We bring a DSLR, flattering lighting, and custom print templates — so people walk away with something worth keeping, not just a shared album link nobody opens.

The average Fam Jam event generates 400+ digital images — candid moments, group shots, and the kind of photos you don't usually get at a party.

  • Crisp 2x6 or 4x6 prints on the spot
  • Custom theme-matched print design
  • Onsite attendant the whole time
  • 400+ high-res digital images per event

People actually keep these prints.

✦ Add-On — $200

Party Photos & Social Reel

We'll capture photos and short video clips throughout the event — enough to cut together a social media reel. Not a full event photographer, just us documenting the vibe as it happens.

2×6 Print
4×6 Print
Custom Theme
Digital Gallery
$600
3 hours · DSLR Photo Booth
Ready When You Are

Lock In Your Date.

Weekends fill up fast in the 805. Let's make sure your party is on the calendar.
